title: phleum pratense var. alpinum
intro: Phleum pratense var. alpinum, also known as alpine timothy grass, is a type of grass that is a variant of the common timothy grass (Phleum pratense). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which can help to soothe and calm the skin. The health benefits of Phleum pratense var. alpinum include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as supporting digestive health. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and topical creams, which can be used to treat a range of skin conditions and promote overall well-being.
